title: Take — one immutable rendered/imported artifact belonging to a scene

file.description: Project-relative, inside the canonical namespace: videos/<project>/work/generated/<scene_uid>/<take_uid>/asset.<ext>. Create-exclusive; never overwritten.

source_file.description: Optional preserved original upload beside the conformed artifact (source.<ext>)

sha256.description: Hash of the conformed artifact; identity for dedupe + integrity

conform_profile.description: cutaway_h264: H.264 8-bit yuv420p comp-native · overlay_alpha: ProRes 4444 .mov alpha preserved · image_norm: metadata/dimension normalize only · audio_norm: rate/loudness pass · original: untouched (validator flags where a conformed profile is required)

spec.description: Regeneration contract (prompt/model/seed/params or composition_id+props), stored verbatim from the job

parent_take_uid.description: Which take this revises — the revision DAG
